title: ShapesFoundry
description:
YOUR PC HAS A PULSE. MAKE IT VISIBLE — AND MAKE IT YOURS.
SHAPESFOUNDRY is a full design studio for live hardware dashboards. Build stunning, animated HUDs that breathe with your machine — CPU, GPU, memory, network, temperatures, fan speeds — every number turned into glowing gauges, sweeping arcs, pulsing neon and cinematic motion.

No coding. No fixed layouts. No "pick one of three skins". You get a real canvas, real vector tools and a real-time engine — and your hardware becomes the show.

Design it once in SHAPESFOUNDRY. Run it forever with SHAPESFOUNDRY//LIVE, the feather-light viewer that sits on your desk, your second monitor or your mini-screen, faithfully replaying your creation pixel by pixel.

• Built for gamers who want a command deck, not a task manager.

• Built for modders and case-builders who demand a custom look.

• Built for professionals who monitor serious iron in style.
🎮 GAME OVERLAY — YOUR STATS, ON TOP OF THE ACTIONSHAPESFOUNDRY//LIVE turns your dashboard into a true click-through overlay: hit one hotkey (Ctrl+Shift+T) and your temps, loads, clocks and fan RPMs float over windowed and borderless games while every click passes straight through to the game underneath. Dial in background transparency so only the backdrop fades and your readouts stay razor-sharp, with an on-screen "overlay on" indicator and global hotkeys. No second monitor required. Your command deck, right where the action is.🎨 CUSTOMIZE EVERYTHING — OR BUILD IT FROM SCRATCHThis isn't a skin picker. Every widget — every pixel — is yours: visual type, size, geometry, colors, gradients, glow, shadow, fonts and animation, all editable per element, with no fixed layouts and nothing you're locked into. Don't like the built-in gauges, rings or frames? Draw your own in the built-in vector studio. Restyle an entire dashboard with a single palette change through the semantic theme engine — then override any single widget that wants to stand apart. Even the editor bends to you: dockable, reorderable panels arranged the way YOU work. If you can picture it, you can build it.A REAL WIDGET ARSENALArc gauges, concentric rings, donut gauges, seven-segment displays, multi-channel line charts, bars with sparklines, LED & VU meters, dynamic tables, analog clock, rich sensor-bound text, vector animations, CoreBars (per-core CPU load, P/E-core aware) and a Media "Now Playing" widget.A VECTOR STUDIO INSIDEFull vector toolset with boolean ops, live parametric arrays, live symmetry, multi-stop gradients, AlongPath stroke shading, per-shape neon/glow/shadow, 9-slice frames and flipbook animation on any asset — all sensor-bindable.A COLOR ENGINE, NOT A COLOR PICKERA semantic theme engine restyles every widget with one palette change. Dynamic color ranges shift hues as values rise. Text effects: neon, pulse, flicker, scanlines, animated gradients, 3D extrusion.LIVE HARDWARE MONITORINGReal-time sensors via LibreHardwareMonitor — built-in, no install required: CPU, GPU, memory, storage, motherboard, network. Built-in simulators let you design realistic dashboards on any PC, even with no hardware attached.SHAPESFOUNDRY//LIVE — THE VIEWERThe feather-light viewer keeps your dashboard always-on-top, hot-reloads from the editor the instant you save, switches scenes live, and renders DPI-aware on 4K and mixed-DPI multi-monitor setups. Truly portable: no installer, no admin rights, no background services, zero registry persistence. (Game overlay mode covered above.)

Don't watch your stats. Stage them.
description_short: Your stats, on top of the game. A no-code studio for live hardware dashboards: build unlimited custom widgets from CPU, GPU, temps and fans, then drop them as a click-through game overlay. No coding needed; power users also get a full formula engine.
